title: Reading and Use of English - Part 7
description: You are going to read an article about four people talking about how they engage with art and creative activities. For questions 43–52, choose from the people (A–D). The people may be chosen more than once.

texts.A:
### Chloe, 30, Photographer
[43]I see art in everyday life, not just in galleries[/43]. Taking photos helps me notice details others might miss. [47]I enjoy experimenting with different styles and techniques[/47]. [50]Sharing my work online has connected me with creative people worldwide[/50].
texts.B:
### Daniel, 27, Musician
[44]Music has always been my way of expressing emotions I can’t put into words[/44]. [48]I love collaborating with other artists and learning from them[/48]. [51]Performing live gives me a sense of freedom I don’t find elsewhere[/51].
texts.D:
### Priya, 22, Student
[45]I started painting as a way to relax during stressful times[/45]. [49]Art has taught me patience and perseverance[/49]. [52]I believe everyone has a creative side, even if they don’t realise it[/52].
texts.C:
### Tom, 35, Architect
[46]Designing buildings is my form of creativity[/46]. [47]I like to blend functionality with beauty in my work[/47]. [49]Seeing my ideas become reality is incredibly satisfying[/49].

questions.question: finds inspiration for art in ordinary surroundings?
questions.explanation: Chloe sees art in everyday life, not just galleries.

questions.question: uses art to express feelings they can’t say directly?
questions.explanation: Daniel uses music to express emotions he can’t put into words.

questions.question: began a creative activity to cope with stress?
questions.explanation: Priya started painting to relax during stressful times.

questions.question: sees their job as a form of artistic expression?
questions.explanation: Tom says designing buildings is his form of creativity.

questions.question: enjoys trying out new creative approaches?
questions.explanation: Chloe enjoys experimenting with styles and techniques.

questions.question: values working with other creative people?
questions.explanation: Daniel loves collaborating with other artists.

questions.question: has learned important life skills through art?
questions.explanation: Priya says art taught her patience and perseverance.

questions.question: has made connections with others through sharing their work?
questions.explanation: Chloe has connected with creative people worldwide by sharing her work online.

questions.question: feels a unique sense of freedom when performing?
questions.explanation: Daniel feels free when performing live.

questions.question: believes everyone has creative potential?
questions.explanation: Priya believes everyone has a creative side.
